BREAKING: Alex Hormozi charges $1,000,000 to teach you cold outreach.

Here are 6 Claude prompts that write every cold email, DM, and follow-up like he would. For free.

(Save this. Send tonight.) https://t.co/D82tEoUDYr

4/ HANDLE ANY OBJECTION

Prompt:

<role>Act as a DM conversion specialist who writes short, natural direct messages that start real conversations — not sales pitches.</role>

<task>Write a cold DM for my prospect that opens a conversation without feeling like an unsolicited sales

6/ BUILD AN OUTREACH SEQUENCE

Prompt:

<role>Act as a follow-up sequence specialist who writes persistent outreach that adds value instead of adding pressure.</role>

<task>Write a 3-touch follow-up sequence for a prospect who hasn't replied — each message adding something new

I should charge $99 for each of these.
But every single guide on this page is free.
